summary: Go-based GitHub git command accelerator that can act as a near drop-in replacement for git for clone, pull, push, fetch, and related GitHub operations.
primary_use: Accelerate public GitHub clone / pull / fetch
Fallback accelerator when normal git clone is slow or fails
Transparent git command wrapper for GitHub HTTPS workflows
recommended_agent_usage: First try normal git clone --depth=1 for public repositories.
If normal clone is slow or fails, try fgit clone <repo-url> --depth=1.
Use fgit only for GitHub repository operations, not arbitrary file downloads.
Avoid using public acceleration services for private repositories or token-bearing URLs.
capabilities: Supports clone, pull, push, fetch, update-style git operations
Automatically switches between mirror mode and HTTPS proxy mode
Restores temporary git mirror/proxy settings after command completion
limitations: May temporarily modify global or local git configuration
security_notes: Mirror mode is not suitable for private repositories or push operations.
Do not route tokens, private repository URLs, or credentials through public proxies.
If config remains modified after interruption, manually inspect .gitconfig or .git/config.
